name: June
tagline: Product analytics for B2B SaaS teams using Segment data
description: June is a product analytics tool built on top of Segment, designed specifically for B2B SaaS companies. It auto-generates reports for key SaaS metrics — activation, retention, churn, company-level analytics — without requiring manual dashboard setup. Simpler and faster to get value from than Mixpanel or Amplitude for early-stage and growth-stage SaaS teams.
pros: Much faster to set up than Amplitude or Mixpanel
Company-level analytics out of the box
